title: Stock News Ticker Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Stock News Ticker plugin

enabled.description: Enable or disable the stock news ticker plugin

display_duration.description: Duration in seconds to display the ticker when dynamic duration is disabled

update_interval_seconds.description: How often to fetch fresh headlines (seconds). Default: 15 minutes

max_daily_requests.description: Maximum total RSS requests per day across all symbols and feeds

max_requests_per_hour.description: Maximum RSS requests per rolling hour

display_style.description: What to show per news item: logo + ticker text, text only, or logo + symbol only

logo_fetch_enabled.description: Automatically download company logos and cache them to disk

logo_size.description: Logo height in pixels (width scales proportionally to maintain aspect ratio)

logo_url_template.description: URL template for logo downloads. Use {symbol} as placeholder (e.g. AAPL)

scroll_speed.description: Legacy scroll speed multiplier (used when scroll_pixels_per_second is not set)

scroll_delay.description: Legacy delay between scroll steps in seconds (used when scroll_target_fps is not set)

scroll_pixels_per_second.description: Scroll speed in pixels per second

scroll_target_fps.description: Target FPS for the scroll animation

dynamic_duration.description: Automatically set display duration based on total content width

min_duration.description: Minimum display duration when dynamic duration is enabled (seconds)

max_duration.description: Maximum display duration when dynamic duration is enabled (seconds)

rotation_enabled.description: Rotate through headlines so each one gets screen time after each scroll cycle

rotation_threshold.description: Number of full scroll cycles before rotating to the next headline

max_headlines_per_symbol.description: Maximum headlines to show per stock symbol per update

headlines_per_rotation.description: Maximum headlines to pull from each custom RSS feed

font_size.description: Font size for headline and symbol text (pixels)

items.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, GOOGL, BRK.B)

stock_symbols.description: Stock symbols to fetch live headlines for (via Yahoo Finance RSS)

custom_feeds.description: Additional RSS feeds keyed by display name (any financial RSS URL)

symbol_color.description: RGB color for stock symbol labels
